quality.description_clarity: Clear and concise, describes the mechanical effect.
quality.mechanic_completeness: Fully defines the trigger (rolling a 20 on an attack roll) and the effect (extra 2d6 damage).

mechanics.trigger: Rolling a natural 20 on an attack roll.
mechanics.effect: Deals an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type upon a critical hit.
mechanics.power_level_assessment: Appropriate for a Rare item; consistent with established 'Vicious' properties in D&D.

analysis.archival_notes: The entry is straightforward and mechanically sound. It correctly implements the standard 'Vicious' property found in D&D source material.
